old_column.content: An accessible dropdown menu for the common dropdown menu button design pattern.

new_column.content: An accessible dropdown menu for the common dropdown menu button design pattern.

old_column.content: Menu uses roving tabIndex for focus management.

new_column.content: Menu uses roving tabIndex for focus management.

old_column.content: To access the internal state of the Menu, use a function as a `children`

new_column.content: To access the internal state of the Menu, use a function as a `children`

old_column.content: (commonly known as a render prop). You'll get access to the internal state

new_column.content: (commonly known as a render prop). You'll get access to the internal state

old_column.content: When focus is on the `MenuButton` or within the `MenuList` and you type a letter

new_column.content: When focus is on the `MenuButton` or within the `MenuList` and you type a letter

old_column.content: key, a search begins. Focus will move to the first `MenuItem` that starts with

new_column.content: key, a search begins. Focus will move to the first `MenuItem` that starts with

old_column.content: > Open the menu, try and type any letter, say "S" to see the focus movement.

new_column.content: > Open the menu, try and type any letter, say "S" to see the focus movement.

old_column.content: To group related `MenuItems`, use the `MenuGroup` component and pass it a label

new_column.content: To group related `MenuItems`, use the `MenuGroup` component and pass it a label

old_column.content: You can compose a menu for table headers to help with sorting and filtering

new_column.content: You can compose a menu for table headers to help with sorting and filtering
